mission.title: operator-framework: Make generated inventory define implicit localhost
mission.description:
**Description of the change:**
Makes localhost default to the same python interpreter as the one that is running ansible

**Motivation for the change:**
Our generated inventory wasn't setting the default ansible python interpreter for localhost to match Ansible's implicit localhost, which made running up local difficult.

closes #1437 

Thanks to @nmasse-itix

steps: Review the issue discussion for context
Apply the fix from the linked pull request
